audit_items.proof_trace: The `transmit` function iterates all `unverifiedReports` in a loop (L140-150) and reverts with `FeedNotAllowlisted` if `s_dataStreamsFeedIdToAsset[bytes32(reportData)] == address(0)` for any entry before `verifyBulk` is called (L153). `bytes32(reportData)` correctly extracts the first 32 bytes of the ABI-encoded `ReportV3`, which is the `dataStreamsFeedId` field, and `verifyBulk` has no other production call site.
